LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFFS MORELIANO DZUL, JUAN RIVAS, WILLIAM CAVICH, SANTOS YEN, RONY DE LEON'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT IS DENIED. THE SUMMARY PROCEDURE TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENTS PERMITTED UNDER CCP SECTION 664.6 REQUIRES THAT THE AGREEMENT HAVE BEEN SIGNED BY THE PARTIES OR AGREED TO ORALLY IN COURT. THIS STATUTORY REQUIREMENT IS NOT MET HERE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DECEMBER 23 MAIL SERVICE DOES NOT PROVIDE 16 COURT DAY NOTICE PLUS 5 CALENDAR DAYS FOR MAIL SERVICE. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-09-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS MORELIANO DZUL, JUAN RIVAS, WILLIAM CAVICH, SANTOS YEN, RONY DE LEON'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. The summary procedure to enforce settlements permitted under CCP section 664.6 requires that the agreement have been signed by the parties or agreed to orally in court. This statutory requirement is not met here. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-30-2010 Continued To Dec-09-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFFS MORELIANO SANTOS CAVICH DZUL, JUAN MANUEL GIRON RIVAS, WILLIAM CANUEL CAVICH, SANTOS MARGARITO CAN YEN, AND RONY DE LEON'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Continue to December 9, 2010. Opposing party to provide courtesy copy of opposition and moving party to provide courtesy copy of reply to Department 302 per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B, and attach a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
